textByHashes.d18018c467b8aa7e22c1e960592b2d76f59b9d1b: Master thief? Ain't we the ambitious one!
textByHashes.f4e96d51de59b5c2e1c99b16aa70a01f46af0f77: Well, you're gonna have to do something pretty amazing.
textByHashes.9b0f13be75a51fdfabbe40bbfaef6efb26cf3da4: Well, some of the MOST coveted prizes in thiefdom right now are in the pirate town of Brimhaven on Karamja.
textByHashes.7342a72f99f4385dacd2e1e664498226a730635b: The pirate leader Scarface Pete has a pair of extremely valuable candlesticks.
textByHashes.1b55c015285ab1e54642fca5bde94ce9b720b967: We, of course, have gang members in a town like Brimhaven who may be able to help you.
textByHashes.cfa1a48fdcc5564d1bb58c97970bd44f3e4a575e: Visit our hideout in the alleyway on Palm Street. To get in you will need to tell them the secret password 'four leafed clover'.
textByHashes.65059c95def6a970608722123d0d6fb62792bb0c: I'll be giving a master thieves armband to the one who retrieved that. I know it wasn't you.
textByHashes.3e566189fb8845e36f9b6b55ba4ec7753774f22b: This really is a FINE bit of thievery.
textByHashes.f378c4645b15957e34c365486a0a66e7badef5f6: Us thieves have been trying to get hold of this one for a while!
textByHashes.0762eb644d87c7050c5b4e716a1cb0750248a682: You wanted to be ranked as a master thief didn't you? Well, I guess this just about ranks as good enough!
textByHashes.f901cd42dffc7c72eb056bb277236c4111f071de: It's a private business. Can I help you at all?
textByHashes.a264d090d789677e4f87218dafb8adfa742488e3: Yes, I can understand that. So what do you want with us?
textByHashes.a70700c4cd0612b1c6ddd1030dfbbc098c3a9979: Normally we recruit for our gang by watching local thugs and thieves in action. People don't normally waltz in here saying 'hello, can I play'.
textByHashes.0b86c5f04860cdce13c4f00fd6f9b803e3124cff: How can I be sure you can be trusted?
textByHashes.6c6007a13fe3df3ed797eb01742d5640ff3a4d13: Thinking about it... I may have a solution actually.
textByHashes.c3ee9db7ff410b99d319893cbf2d762d13dfe8e9: Our rival gang - the Phoenix Gang - has a weapons stash a little east of here.
textByHashes.51b60acdc3960ec74258e55e5a592560f7addfe2: We're fresh out of crossbows, so if you could steal a couple of crossbows for us it would be very much appreciated.
textByHashes.44adfe3ea22fab2200c1e73056f42f7497de0c2f: Then I'll be happy to call you a Black Arm.
textByHashes.88d5ea30208984fff6d6215764f55f2416249204: I have an idea for framing a local merchant who is refusing to pay our, very reasonable, 'keep-your-life-pleasant' insurance rates. I need two phoenix crossbows; one to kill somebody important with and the other to
textByHashes.c594bc1d50508aae7ca9945bc1bcb36ce6a0a67e: hide in the merchant's house where the local law can find it! When they find it, they'll suspect him of murdering the target for the Phoenix Gang and, hopefully, arrest the whole gang! Leaving us as the only
textByHashes.5f4dd5d885ed3fd455b57ccb02a2788679493729: thieves gang in Varrock! Brilliant, eh?
textByHashes.7d2737f24342501c2991c48eeab721f46f2c37ac: I haven't decided yet, but it'll need to be somebody important. Say, why are you being so nosey? You aren't with the law are you?
textByHashes.a431c71fcf3568f7972464564dccfb4460e4e6ae: You'd better just keep your mouth shut about this plan, or I'll make sure it stays shut for you. Now, are you going to go get those crossbows or not?
textByHashes.c0388bd9b62e522a280fc38d60e502a3bb925070: Great! You'll find the Phoenix gang's weapon stash just next to a temple, due east of here.
textByHashes.6807f64eed8a20e78078eb1ef7b535405a8799ee: If you're not up to a little bit of danger I don't think you've got anything to offer our gang.
textByHashes.9c8ea11a15c7cbc143debeb7574cb0cc45edb7bd: ... How unusual. Someone honest wanting to join a gang of thieves. Excuse me if I remain unconvinced.
textByHashes.3002f2810ca90c09d4149e2a5919e4f4b2f4a979: Well, I'm sorry luv, I'm not giving away any of my secrets.
textByHashes.9cbbd8b01c17b81a34281600312771c16a26234d: Not to people who ain't Black Arm members anyway.
textByHashes.f51c99a789dc5caac26f44349131f293b76101fd: Try...the one you just came in?
textByHashes.a3f7ed1c8c5652cfd4d84525d30532349e44e55a: Is that guy still out there? He's getting to be a nuisance. Remind me to send someone to kill him.
textByHashes.f24eb4e182e0f5a9a0864b13bf50e942e9549bb0: So now you've found us, what do you want?
textByHashes.65e06ce260e7558239682e545ad084dff8082955: I thought we were safe back here!
textByHashes.06341b5e64167d88a9e8526d7d714153c8ac6a0c: Wow! We MUST be obvious! I guess they'll be expecting bribes again soon in that case.
textByHashes.e7177ba9e8c358491786f27e3e716c467ce0ebcc: Is there anything else you want to tell me?
textByHashes.892a3925ee800710e5a2da1991fd70c57ea9c017: A small, family business. We give financial advice to other companies.
textByHashes.c53721cc8206015d119f35c0e97693d596e5160c: And you expect to find it up the back streets of Varrock?
textByHashes.cf793a0dd5a2e6bcb3f8a4615473e515aa5b30e9: Have you got those crossbows for me yet?
textByHashes.73868f0edaf5262a7a2ab0b89d1efa02439df324: I need two crossbows stolen from the Phoenix Gang weapons stash, which if you head east for a bit, is a building on the south side of the road.
textByHashes.f7ed1a7a3419638968037f3888080fe34b4f6eb5: I need two. Come back when you have them.
textByHashes.587d48afe10c9225122c4837be0de6d365a7a774: Ok. You can join our gang now. Feel free to enter any of the rooms of the ganghouse.
textByHashes.5d8cc9b748cd385da5e29127edaf0dab2b0223b7: They're just various rogues and thieves.
textByHashes.2f5780e97b4b28eeaae04db265ec0cfa8620fa2c: You've got some guts coming here, Phoenix guy!
textByHashes.659e3302c1771718b96849356953715964eeb7ab: Or I'll make sure you 'aven't got those guts anymore!
textByHashes.7f402620d9a46cfb12469315a0676186aa1c0d19: Hmm... I suppose I can understand that. So, say we were the Black Arm Gang, what would you want with us?
textByHashes.7b77110499260c9ad99143c80b0fd720c7ca1922: Do you now? And what makes you think I'll provide anything like that?
textByHashes.05d20fd8554b659cb187defd832a064cdbdcff3c: How unusual... Okay, let's say we are who you believe we are. Do you think we'd be recruiting people who just waltz in here saying 'hello, I'd like to play'?
textByHashes.c6a3aa07eb2aa61f16ac27d9bf8652547a6c3ee7: Watching local thugs and thieves in action, perhaps? How do I know I can just trust someone who's wandered in here.
textByHashes.0dacc3de365842a827cf48cb2d992a77e451728d: Someone honest wanting to join a gang of thieves? Excuse me if I remain unconvinced...
textByHashes.aeadbafab0fdf47c591ec1e9fae55ca5751fd05d: Thinking about it... I may have a solution actually. You may have heard of the Phoenix Gang. I hear they have a very nice weapons stash not too far from here.
textByHashes.03a94a4bce858960110f42c4d40bc23f11b8168f: We're fresh out of crossbows, but apparently they have plenty. If someone were to aquire a couple for us, it would be very much appreciated.
textByHashes.eddb7c40fccba0bc7b36f77a94f76c9c2b981264: Let's just say there's a local merchant who is refusing to pay some very reasonable 'keep-your-life-pleasant' insurance rates.
textByHashes.7a09bf72f0fa885d65aaf210b986b7b9df15e871: Him? No. However, I hear that the local law might soon be finding a crossbow belonging to the Phoenix Gang in his home...
textByHashes.0a14363caeb4441c7680488d7acb84b4fc64b88f: I also hear that a similar type of crossbow might soon be used in a murder on the other side of the city...
textByHashes.467a0c8a4625c090fd4e85d44361962da0478389: Now, are you going to keep asking questions, or are you going to go get those crossbows?
textByHashes.9449e94c777d2487228812281b197f36e963ba0b: Great! Apparently the Phoenix Gang's weapons stash is somewhere to the east. Ask that tramp outside. I'm sure he'll know more.
textByHashes.54c52891efac2583b4490b0bccf5075e38139209: If you're not up for a little bit of danger, I don't think you've got anything to offer us.
textByHashes.45e3648d2d5aa0754b7e014d7d93ced982f1de67: Try... the one you just came through?
textByHashes.0958c2b9ab0e76b3679cd667372070c27d3ae784: Is that guy still out there? He's getting to be a nuisance. Might be time for him to have a little accident...
textByHashes.e9116be97a7aad98fa8883994e7c44376a7fe8a2: Anyway, say we were the Black Arm Gang, what would you want with us?
textByHashes.e00aca805465ec048bb0d8f54c38f6c3ba5c31d7: I see... Well... say we were the Black Arm Gang, what would you want with us?
textByHashes.095c59046d975d48286e152279e3853ba62c772e: A small, family business. We give financial advice to other companies. Now, if you'll excuse me.
textByHashes.1816706341685274dabcabd9474b580bcfa52b78: And you expect to find that up the back streets of Varrock? Keep dreaming.
textByHashes.2ba030beac070f3fe8926ca21efebe52a23ed50a: Apparently the Phoenix Gang's weapons stash is somewhere to the east. Ask that tramp outside. I'm sure he'll know more.
textByHashes.6f9916d88eb8f2015ae032fae7f243dcd79c0814: Well, I need two. Come back when you have them.
textByHashes.65d3cb177054ffbeb43761a854df0021f04536c3: It seems you're more skilled than I originally gave you credit for. Well done. Consider yourself a member of the Black Arm Gang. I'd suggest you now go and familiarise yourself with the rest of the ganghouse.
textByHashes.59087bce9bcb6f659860b18958404fae3340d177: You are. Feel free to familiarise yourself with the rest of the ganghouse.
textByHashes.b73d1210a0fb9563670833bca68788960ee22b20: You've got some guts coming here, Phoenix scum! Get lost, or I'll make sure you haven't got those guts anymore!
textByHashes.f603a10590df1954b53292c23a0b3492a7520b60: You are, but don't make me regret it. In case you didn't hear, someone recently stole something very important from us. We need to be more careful about who we let in.
